title: Fatty Chewy British Rice Vermicelli Scotch Egg
description: A post-workout, dairy-free-friendly British dish featuring rice vermicelli, brine-dried egg, and a fatty, chewy coating. The perfect meal to refuel after a tough workout.
instructions: Preheat a deep frying pan or fryer to 180°C (350°F).
In a mixing bowl, combine ground pork, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Mix until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal parts and shape each part into a ball. Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Place a brine-dried egg in the center of each disk and wrap the mixture around the egg, sealing the edges by pressing firmly.
Dredge each Scotch egg in panko breadcrumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat olive oil in the preheated frying pan or fryer to 180°C (350°F).
Fry the Scotch eggs for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Drain the Scotch eggs on paper towels and serve hot with chopped scallions and water chestnuts on top.
